edit.parentHasChildrenHint: This association has subordinate state associations and therefore cannot be assigned to a parent association.
edit.parentInheritedHint: Settings and email addresses are inherited from {{ name }}.
edit.expressLicenseHint: Club managers can enable the express option when applying for licenses. Submitting the application triggers an automatic notification to the SBK.
edit.refereeReviewHint: When importing course results via CSV, records with master-data corrections or new entries are submitted to this state association's RSK for review and approval before being added to the master record.
edit.scanRequiredHint: Participants must upload the physical game report sheet after the game. The host receives an email reminder once the game day is closed.
edit.manualProceedingLabel: Manual creation of protests by the SBK
edit.manualProceedingHint: The SBK can review proceeding proposals and manually open or reject sports-court proceedings.
edit.vskEmailHint: Recipient for uploaded referee report forms
edit.sbkEmailHint: BCC recipient for game day checklists with rejected items
edit.bannerHint: WebP · max. 500 KB · recommended format 1200 × 200 px (6:1)
edit.linkUrlHint: Optional – banner then becomes clickable · applied only when saved
edit.releasesDescription: Sports associations with a release can view and edit the clubs of this state association in the club administration.
edit.checklistDescription: Yes/no questions that must be answered before finalizing a game report. Becomes active only when at least one question is defined.
